programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A sticky bun should be neither dense nor bready, neither saturated with butter nor so sugary that it makes your heart race. The crumb should be tender and feathery and the sticky glaze gently chewy and gooey. Here's how we made ours.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Brownies are too often dull, and blondies (as well as congo bars, their coconut-flavored cousins) can be even worse, since they are even plainer. We decided to keep things simple while focusing on developing superior flavor and texture.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Cakes baked in Bundt and tube pans are popular for a variety of reasons. These pans make cakes that are especially attractive, and the cakes themselves tend to be pretty simple to prepare. In this episode, we make angel food and a chocolate Bundt cake.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to develop the perfect pumpkin cheesecake recipe, but we never figured it would take 30 cheesecakes to develop a great recipe worthy of the finest holiday dinner.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Watch as we take two modern classic desserts —a chocolate volcano cake and caramelized pears—and make them approachable for the home cook.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our hearty frittata is just as filling as an omelet, but a whole lot easier to prepare and serve. We also uncover the formula for the ideal quiche filling and deliver a tender, buttery pastry crust filled with moist, smooth custard.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we look at a few of our favorite Tex-Mex dishes: tomato salsa, quesadillas, and beef tacos.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen shows you how to make two hearty soups: black bean and tortilla.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What could be more synonymous with fall than butternut squash? In this episode, we explore two main-course squash recipes: a creamy, comforting soup perfect for serving on a busy weeknight and a rich, hearty risotto suitable for entertaining.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We investigate inexpensive steaks and find out which were worth eating and how best to prepare them. We also take a look at a classic accompaniment to steak: mashed potatoes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When most people think of dishes like lasagna and jambalaya, they think of labor-intensive weekend meals. In this episode, however, we develop versions that could be prepared on a busy weeknight.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Two old-fashioned dishes with modern appeal: Boston baked beans and chicken and dumplings. Neither requires fancy ingredients or expensive equipment, just a little time and effort.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What's for Sunday dinner? Around many American tables, it's meat and potatoes. Beef brisket is a good choice and a nice change from pot roast or beef stew. Although inexpensive and simple to prepare, brisket does pose some challenges to the cook.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: There are certain dinners we rely on again and again. We are particularly fond of roasting chicken and potatoes together in one pan. While the chicken roasts, its juices drip onto the potatoes, giving them a wonderfully rich crust and creamy flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We develop a foolproof preparation for pork chops with vinegar and peppers—a modern version tangy and juicy enough to rival that prepared by an Italian grandmother. Next, we turn to pan-roasted pork tenderloin.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Tuna, which is often served rare to medium-rare, can be particularly tricky to get just right with a nicely seared crust. As for halibut, we developed a technique that ensured perfect texture without a loss of flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Some people are intimidated by the thought of preparing fish. Traditional dishes, like Fish Meunière, can seem even more daunting. But you don't need to be wearing a toque to prepare this French classic well.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most Italian recipes seem startlingly easy to prepare, requiring just a few simple ingredients. But some dishes need special care to reach their full potential. In this episode, we demystify two Italian classics: Fettuccine Alfredo and Beef in Barolo.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we prepare an Indian-inspired shrimp curry and a Thai-inspired green curry with chicken.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When you eat chicken frequently, it pays to have a number of preparations on hand. In this episode, we turn to orange-flavored chicken and chicken teriyaki.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: One of our favorite Spanish dishes is paella. But with a lengthy ingredient list the shopping alone can give the home cook pause. We take a hard look at paella to see if we can pare back this dish to its humble origins without losing its alluring flavors.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to develop a hassle-free pizza recipe especially for the grill—one we hope will become a new backyard barbecue favorite.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork loin is delicious roasted in the oven, but it takes on a new character when cooked on the grill. The fire imparts a delicate smokiness to the meat, and the heat creates a handsome crust. French potato salad is a perfect counterpoint to the pork.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to develop a recipe for pulled pork that rivals that of the best barbecue joints but won't be an all-day affair. We pair the pork with another barbecue classic—cornbread.

programme.desc: The situation worsens, and Gon and his friends receive Ponzu's message.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Under Lisa Lisa’s tutelage, Joseph and Caesar must endure their final test. But while Caesar hones his skills, Joseph is stunned by an ancient and unexpected foe.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Joseph returns to Lisa Lisa, unaware of the bizarre stowaway he has delivered. A possessed confidant then attacks, ultimately sending the crew to Switzerland, where another revelation awaits.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Pillar Man
programme.desc: In search of the mysterious Pillar Man, Joseph arrives in Mexico to promising news but deadly resistance. Now the German army’s thirst for power may have awakened an unstoppable power—even for Joseph.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: JoJo vs. The Ultimate Lifeform
programme.desc: Trading blows with Santviento, Joseph employs his usual wit, but the jokes fall as flat as the Hamon. Stroheim surprises as he sheds light on the lethal Pillar Men, leaving Joseph hanging in more ways than one.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Ultimate Warriors from Ancient Times
programme.desc: Joseph and Speedwagon travel to Rome to meet another Hamon wielder, Caesar Zeppeli, who takes them to the enigmatic Pillar Men. While Joseph and Caesar clash, they arrive to find a grim awakening.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: A Hero's Proof
programme.desc: Caesar confronts Wamuu and the other Pillar Men, but falters, clearing the way for Joseph. But anxiety replaces audacity as Joseph’s plan invites a presumable death sentence.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: In mysterious Venice, Joseph and Caesar begin training under the equally enigmatic Lisa Lisa. Let the Hamon “hell” begin!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: An invasion of bloodthirsty dragons can only be stopped by the sacrifice of a rare bearbee.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Yuri meets the young king of Little Cimaron at a hot spring and agrees to go home with him.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: King Saralegi of Little Cimaron has designs on his honored guest, Yuri, while Ken and the others back home set out to rescue him.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Yuri returns to the Great Demon Kingdom after an absence, only to find that Wolfram is about to replace him as king.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Yuri has to prove himself if he's going to retain his regal position.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Wolfram breaks off his engagement with Yuri and returns to his ancestral land.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Yuri and Wolfram buy Greta a miniature bearbee, but bad things happen when water touches it.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Yuri is tasked with finding a stolen sacred sword so Lyla can get married.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: Is Sage the true Warrior of Light?

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: A new clue reveals the mysteries of Cye.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: In their search for Kento, Mia and Sage uncover a mysterious figure on their path.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Auctioneers Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw embark on the last leg of their road trip, shopping in Perthshire and Angus. It's two auctions each -- who will win the final decisive battle in Aberdeen?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a new adventure with Anita Manning and Philip Serrell. Their journey starts in the Lake District and finishes at an auction near Blackpool.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and Philip Serrell, in their classic Fiat 500, leave from Barnard Castle in County Durham and head for auction in Driffield in Yorkshire. Can Anita hang on to her early lead or will Phil find a gem with a big return?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil Serrell and Anita Manning begin the day in Frodsham in Cheshire and end up at an auction in Easingwold in Yorkshire. Anita risks her lead by blowing her whole budget, but will she regret it?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and Phil Serrell embark on the second-to-last leg and Anita's got some serious catching up to do. Their journey begins in the village of Amble in Northumberland and heads for an auction in Carlisle in Cumbria.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the final leg for auctioneers Anita Manning and Phil Serrell as they kick off in their Fiat 500 from Castle Douglas in Kirkcudbrightshire and finish at a nail-biting final auction in Crooklands in the Lake District.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Christina Trevanion and Thomas Plant begin their Road Trip in the Republic of Ireland. Starting from Cashel, County Tipperary, in a 1962 Bedford van, they hunt for treasures to take to auction in Birr in County Offaly.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Traveling in their 1962 Bedford van, auctioneers Christina Trevanion and Thomas Plant shop their way through Ireland, from County Kildare to the Dublin, before heading over the Irish sea for their auction in the Welsh town of Wrexham.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and Thomas Plant continue their adventure in North Wales. Can Christina win the third leg in a row and hang on to her lead?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the penultimate leg for auctioneers Christina Trevanion and Thomas Plant as they shop around Warwickshire, Essex, and get treated to a spectacular Battle of Britain airshow. They then head for auction in Winchcombe, Gloucestershire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the final leg for Christina Trevanion and Thomas Plant. Starting in Gwersyllt in Wrexham, they meander through the border counties of North Wales and England, finishing up at their final auction in Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross set Road Trip records the last time he was paired with James Braxton, but can he do it again? They set off from Boston and head to their first auction in the Norfolk town of Fakenham.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In a Ford Zephyr, auctioneers Charlie Ross and James Braxton continue their hunt from the Lincolnshire town of Stamford, then travel east around Norfolk before ending up at an auction in the Cambridgeshire market town of St Ives.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Auctioneers Charlie Ross and James Braxton are half-way through their trip in their Ford Zephyr. This leg sets off from Shenton in Leicestershire and takes them to auction in the village of Bourne End, Buckinghamshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce introduces previously unscreened finds from Lanhydrock and Bodnant Garden.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Items include a unique Beatles piece, a macabre Maori carving, and a Russian painting.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Dumfries House near Ayr in Scotland.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Bridlington's Spa Royal Hall, the team nominate their ideal age of elegance.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team examine objects harking back to the construction of the Titanic.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects include a medicine chest from early Victorian times and rare Irish plate buckets.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team travel to the Bishop's Palace in Wells, Somerset.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects under scrutiny include a valuable bracelet once gifted by Queen Victoria.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team of experts are in Dundee.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Items discovered include a photograph of Winston Churchill and an old theatrical costume.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects found in Dulwich include an early illustration by madcap artist Heath Robinson.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Danielle and Nick insist they were great parents, saying Danielle’s sister, Kimberly, “kidnapped” their child. Kimberly says these parents are drug addicts. Dr. Phil is their chance to bring their child home despite currently living in a homeless shelter.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Fred & Cynthia say daughter, Crystal, is raising her young son in a death trap! No running water, leaky ceiling, exposed wires, smoking electrical sockets, mice & mold! They are ready for CPS. Crystal says her home is a visible form of how she feels.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Meet 15-year-old Marie who says she is now pregnant after running away three times. Dr. Phil confronts Marie about a prenatal regimen, her plan and ensuing drama over a pregnancy test request. Dr. Phil and the family discuss pregnancy test results. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What's a woman to do when her spouse is constantly standing over her shoulder and nitpicking everything she does.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It's a tale of torture that shocked America and Dr. Phil speaks exclusively to one woman who lived to tell it. The first of three women abducted by Ariel Castro, Michelle Knight, recounts her story inside Cleveland’s now notorious House of Horrors. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: At age 45, Jeff moved back into his childhood bedroom in his mother's home & has reverted to a high schooler, for 16 years. Jeff's daughter, Tori, says her dad is a terrible father, an immature coward. Jeff comes face-to-face with his fed-up family.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Is it wrong to go dating for dollars? Dr. Phil's guests say if you want to court them, you have to pay to play! Two self-proclaimed gold diggers share their tips for getting loot, and a woman wonders if it's wrong to be attracted to wealthy men.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tiffany & Sheka aren't alone in accusations ex-boyfriend Erik lies & scams constantly. Dr. Phil talks to ex-girlfriends Torri & Courtney & ex-wife, Martha, all sharing in Erik's deceitful behavior. Erik's revealed as an alleged con man--will he change?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brooklyn, 18, says she is tired of her mom butting into her love life with boyfriend Eric. Mom Courtney says it's because Brooklyn's boyfriend has two children & a wife! Eric's wife, Mandy, wants Brooklyn to leave her husband alone & she'll fight for him.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Anita says her son Orrin, 24, after graduating from NYU, announced he is a mechanized cyborg from the year 2050! Orrin says he's part of a "collective intelligence" sent back in time by "higher beings" to warn humanity of the upcoming apocalypse.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Lorie says husband, Dan, knew she placed a baby for adoption when she was 15 & he always supported her finding him. Dan says after reuniting with son, John, 26, family life shattered. Dan says he believes Lorie & John have an inappropriate relationship.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Summer Wells, 5, vanished from her Tennessee home, June 15, 2021. Parents Don & Candus claim abduction; online bullies say the opposite. Don & Candus meet with Scott Rouse & Greg Hartley, body language experts who work with the FBI, police and military.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The outrageous accusations & animosity continues between warring exes Libby & Brian. What happened that prompted Dr. Phil to consider asking Brian to leave and not return?

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Daddy Farquhar continues to visit the Clampetts' mansion to his daughter Margaret's displeasure. He has plans for Granny and her money in Las Vegas but she's expecting a marriage proposal.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: The Clampetts believe resuming his courtship of Elly is why Sonny Drysdale returns. His stepfather arranges a job as a beauty product salesman and his sixth stop at the Clampetts is where his merchandise is mistaken as courting gifts.

programme.desc: Granny, along with Elly, is heading back to the hills to do some doctoring. Mr. Drysdale is frantic to stop her so he reveals that the Brewsters are having a baby. Jethro brings home some girls from the Kit Kat Club so he won't be lonely.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A shady magician sells his wares to the gullible Jethro.

programme.desc: Jed thinks Granny needs help in cleaning the mansion, but she believes it's because he wants to put her in a retirement home, so Granny is ready to head to the hills with her money, which Mr. Drysdale is desperate to avoid.

programme.desc: Drysdale, at first irate that beautiful actress Bergstrom is kept on an expensive stipend without making a film, is smitten at first sight and so places the actress in the Clampett home to learn backwoods accents and ways for a movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny brews a batch of her tonic hoping it helps Elly get a husband. Jane and Mr. Biddle are trying to hatch a condor egg but a sip of the potion changes the birdwatcher's focus and the Clampetts need to get him out of a tree.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC continúa su investigación de asesinato en Texas y las pistas descubren una profunda red de corrupción que podría ser el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el caso de un detective que fue asesinado antes de testificar contra un criminal de carrera.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una madre soltera cuyo exesposo tiene un historial de violencia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando un famoso jugador de baloncesto aparece muerto por una aparente sobredosis, Danny investiga sus posibles vínculos con una banda local de drogas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El caso se vuelve personal para Danny cuando trabaja para proteger a la enfermera Faith Madson (Jessie Mueller) de su violento exnovio.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de pasar meses rastreando a su objetivo, Tony se queda con la sangre de un agente del NCIS en sus manos y es tarea de Gibbs ayudarlo a armar las piezas del rompecabezas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS descubre una sorpresa impactante cuando un joven marine llega a su fiesta de bienvenida con una herida mortal de puñalada.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El límite entre la vida personal y profesional de McGee se difumina cuando NCIS descubre una conexión entre su abuela y el asesinato de un teniente de la Marina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca al responsable de un asesino a sueldo que apunta a un Teniente Comandante de la Armada, mientras Abby descubre secretos familiares tras pruebas para donar un riñón.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo de la UAC está investigando varios asesinatos en Bakersfield, California, que han dejado a las víctimas sin identificar. Además, el equipo da la bienvenida a la nueva agente Kate Callahan al redil del UAC.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de secuestros, asesinatos en Seattle envían a la UAC en busca de un sospechoso que sufrió abusos en el pasado y ahora busca venganza.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un avión de pasajeros se estrella en Colorado, llaman al equipo de UAC para elaborar un perfil sobre las extrañas circunstancias del accidente. Kate siente una fuerte vinculación con el caso, ya que le recuerda una tragedia familiar del pasado.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Al encontrar un cuerpo en Atlanta cubierto de rasguños. La UAC cree que esta muerte y posteriores homicidios podrían estar relacionados con una persona que tiene un trastorno obsesivo de la piel.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El caso se vuelve personal para Danny cuando trabaja para proteger a la enfermera Faith Madson (Jessie Mueller) de su violento exnovio.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets Tased while resisting arrest, police interrupt a transaction going down in a parked vehicle, and a man fired from his job vents his anger at a gas station.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.desc: Un miembro del equipo de CSI de las Vegas, Ray Langston, llega a Nueva York para ayudar a Mac y a su equipo a intentar salvar a un rehén de una red de trata de personas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El nido del Cucú (S6 Ep 8)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York reanuda su búsqueda del Asesino de la Brújula después de que un cuerpo cae del puente de la calle 59.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Solsticio de Manhattan (S6 Ep 9)
programme.desc: En la culminación de un misterio de varios episodios, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York descubre la oscura guarida del Asesino de la Brújula.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La casa de la muerte (S6 Ep 10)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York realiza un seguimiento de una llamada a Emergencias que lo lleva a un ático vacío, pero encuentra un cadáver de casi 100 años y una casa con trampas explosivas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Segundas oportunidades (S6 Ep 11)
programme.desc: Encuentran a un drogadicto rehabilitado muerto en un callejón y el equipo de CSI de Nueva York descubre que él fue víctima de un complot premeditado.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Justicia criminal (S6 Ep 12)
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga un brutal apuñalamiento, descubre que se colocaron pruebas en la escena del crimen y eso los enfrenta a un colega de confianza.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Castigo en el juego (S6 Ep 13)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a una hermosa mariscal de campo, estrella de la liga femenina, asesinada en un jacuzzi, llaman al equipo de CSI para que descubra quién la quería muerta.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Tras perder a su familia en un accidente, no le encuentra sentido a la vida, su socio no le quiere comprar su parte del negocio. Alejandra fue violada en su apartamento que tiene seguridad.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Héctor cumplió condena por violación a la hija de María, pero al salir en libertad fue baleado. En otro caso, Esmeralda y su exesposo perdieron todo tras el paso del huracán Harvey.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: A Rasse le gusta que su pareja engorde, su esposo Jesús ya pesa 170 kilos y quiere rebajar de peso por su salud. Tiamat tiene tatuajes y modificaciones corporales que molestan a su hija.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Karla está preso porque supuestamente violó a la hija de Manuela. Además, Cristian es un mesero, sin papeles, que fue despedido por pedirles documentación a los clientes.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Los abuelos de reguetón son famosos en Internet, pero reclaman más dinero. En otro caso, la hija de Humberto y María padece acoso en la escuela y la madre lo grabó.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Elena se enamoró de Alfredo, quien dice que ella confundió la abrazoterapia con amor. En otro caso, Briannet y Cristian le compraron una casa a Griselda, pero había un cadáver en el patio.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Mariana y Eliot tuvieron una relación de una noche y ella quedó embarazada; Mariana quiere que Eliot mantenga al niño. Además, Louis sale de prisión y descubre que la mujer le es infiel.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Jesús, como transeúnte, y Yadiel, como conductor, tienen un accidente en un paso peatonal. Además, Alessandra está deprimida y su terapeuta le recomienda tener un amante.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: La hija de Camila es menor de edad, pero está enamorada de un hombre de 30 años. También, al hijo de Juan y Carolina le hacen una oferta para jugar en el Milán Fútbol Club, pero está lesionado.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Ana quiere tener relaciones sexuales con su esposo Juan, pero este se niega porque teme por la salud de ella. Además, Maxula le entregó su hijo a Anahis pero le devolvieron otro.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Charlie es enfermero de pacientes terminales y decide cumplirles el último deseo, pero algo sale mal. Lisa sube un video a las redes y lo monetiza, Katty quiere ganancias y que baje el video.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Luis y Jéssica fue a una excursión al Amazonas y sufrió un accidente mortal. Además, Josefina es un travesti que fue violado en la prisión de mujeres y en la de hombres.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Camilo no puede convivir con las obsesiones y los celos de Diana, ella ha llegado a la violencia. Karla es anoréxica, pesa 70 libras, todo por la obsesión de su madre por convertirla en modelo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: A Carlos le queda un año de vida y lo quiere pasar tranquilo, pero vive con un gótico sadomasoquista. Andrea quiere la custodia de su hermano para protegerlo de su padre maltratador.

programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence y Javier Bardem ofrecen actuaciones inolvidables en ¡Madre!, el elogiado trabajo de Darren Aronofsky. ¡Experimenta el suspenso psicológico visualmente deslumbrante que dejará tu corazón latiendo y te volará la cabeza!

programme.title: En el juego del asesino
programme.desc: Un detective corre contra-reloj para mantenerse un paso adelante del asesino serial, que dirige ataques mortales desde prisión. Henry Cavill y Ben Kingsley son los protagonistas de esta película llena de acción que no dejará de sorprenderte.

programme.title: Tierra Salvaje
programme.desc: Cuando una derrota en el ring deja a Lion y a su hermano y mánager, Stan, en deuda con un jefe criminal, todos se ven obligados arriesgarlo todo en un torneo de boxeo a puño limpio mientras luchan por una vida mejor.

programme.title: Timecrimes
programme.desc: A man being pursued by a murderer stumbles into a mysterious lab and accidentally travels back in time. A naked girl in the midst of the forest. A cloaked stranger with his face covered in bandages.

programme.title: De Mente y Música
programme.desc: Una historia sobre una bella músico callejera que sufre pérdida de memoria y un neurocientífico descorazonado que intenta ayudarla, uniendo la ciudad de Nueva Orleans y el jazz que la hizo famosa.

programme.title: Más fuerte que el destino
programme.desc: Una victima del ataque terrorista del maratón de Boston en el 2013, ayuda a la policía a rastrear a los asesinos mientras lucha para recuperarse de un trauma devastador.

programme.title: Cosas que diría con solo mirarla
programme.desc: Una historia compuesta de cinco tramas entrelazadas que se centran en un grupo de mujeres cuyas vidas, en el transcurso de unos pocos días, se enredan, se erosionan, se enriquecen y, finalmente, terminan por cambiar para siempre.

programme.title: I.Q: fórmula para amar
programme.desc: Todo el mundo sabe que Einstein es un genio científico. Pero ¿qué hay de Einstein el casamentero? I.Q. pone esta noción a prueba y logra resultados ganadores en esta "divertida y cálida comedia romántica" que aplauden críticos y público.

programme.title: Pequeña voz
programme.desc: Esta es la historia de una joven tímida, cuyo talento para la música la llevará a una increíble e inspiradora transformación.

programme.title: La mujer de mi hermano
programme.desc: Zoe e Ignacio llevan 10 años casados y la pasión se ha enfriado. Una Zoe sexualmente frustrada se siente físicamente atraída por su cuñado. Las cosas se complican aún más después de que ella queda embarazada y descubre que su esposo puede ser gay.

programme.title: La vida inmoral de la pareja ideal
programme.desc: Lucio y Martina, dos jóvenes que se conocen en los primeros años de preparatoria, con una química indescriptible, deciden comerse al mundo sin imaginar que el destino les tiene preparada una sorpresa que los separará.

programme.title: Amo la cocina
programme.desc: Después de una mala crítica de un crítico y una charla del chef Gordon Ramsay, un talentoso pero afligido chef londinense convierte un pub rural en un restaurante gourmet.

programme.title: Cosas te tíos
programme.desc: Jason Lee interpreta a un ejecutivo en la ciudad de Seattle que se va a casar con la hija de su jefe (Selma Blair). Su vida se convierte en una pesadilla cuando no se acuerda si la engañó durante su despedida de soltero.

programme.title: Alfie, el seductor irresistible
programme.desc: Cuando las consecuencias de su estilo de vida afectan a la mujer que ama y a su mejor amigo (Omar Epps), Alfie comienza a preguntarse si hay cosas más importantes que estos romances pasajeros. De ser así, ¿de qué se trata?

programme.title: El Robo más Grande de la Historia
programme.desc: Basada en una historia real, Dwayne Johnson interpreta a un detective de la policía de Nueva York que intenta resolver el mayor robo de dinero de la historia de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Regreso al infierno
programme.desc: Cuando período de servicio en Irak llega a su fin, cuatro soldados estadounidenses se enteran de que están programados pare emprender una misión final. Una misión profética que cambiará eternamente el concepto que tenían hasta ahora de guerra.

programme.title: En el juego del asesino
programme.desc: Un detective corre contra-reloj para mantenerse un paso adelante del asesino serial, que dirige ataques mortales desde prisión. Henry Cavill y Ben Kingsley son los protagonistas de esta película llena de acción que no dejará de sorprenderte.

programme.title: Avengement (LAS)
programme.desc: Fixed localization: Durante su permiso de libertad provisional, un convicto logra esacapar de los guardias y planea su venganza contra aquellos que lo convirtieron en un asesino a sanfre fría.

programme.title: El cuervo 2: Ciudad de Ángeles
programme.desc: Esta secuela veloz y llena de acción de "El cuervo" sigue el ascenso de la víctima de asesinato Ashe Corven, que regresa a la vida gracias a un misterioso cuervo. Con la ayuda de una mujer llamada Sarah, se venga de sus asesinos uno por uno.

programme.title: Highlander III: Dimensión final
programme.desc: En este tercer capítulo de la franquicia de acción trepidante, el inmortal Connor MacLeod está destinado a una batalla decisiva con su despiadado enemigo eterno, Kane.

programme.title: Lluvia Negra
programme.desc: El ganador del Oscar(r) Michael Douglas y Andy García interpretan a dos policías de Nueva York, cuya misión de escoltar a un asesino de regreso a su Japón natal los lleva a los bajos mundos de Osaka y directamente al centro de una batalla violenta.

programme.title: No manches Frida 2
programme.desc: El exconvicto reformado, Zequi (Omar Chaparro), enfrenta una crisis cuando su boda con Lucy (Martha Higareda) se cancela. Mientras intenta recuperar su amor, debe liderar a su escuela en un torneo crucial contra el exnovio perfecto de Lucy. ¡Caos total!

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Cómo cortar a tu patán
programme.desc: Amanda, una terapeuta especializada en ayudar a las mujeres a terminar las relaciones destructivas, vive lejos de los hombres y del compromiso. Dedicada al trabajo y la protección de su hermana Natalia.

programme.title: Bala mordida
programme.desc: Mauro Hernández es un joven policía que bajo las órdenes de su comandante se ve involucrado en un intercambio de droga.

programme.title: Odio el amor
programme.desc: A teenager loses his hearing after a terrible accident. Shortly after, he falls in love with a foreign girl living in Mexico. He then finds out that being in love makes him hear again.

programme.title: José
programme.desc: La vida de un joven de 19 años en la ciudad de Guatemala es rutinaria y sin eventualidades, hasta que encuentra pasión, dolor y autorreflexión a través de una relación con un migrante caribeño.

programme.title: Camino a Marte
programme.desc: Fue amor a primera vista entre José y Abril, pero un accidente causa la muerte de José. En el cielo lo tiene todo, excepto a Abril. José convence a su ángel de la guardia de dejarlo volver a Tierra.

programme.title: Especies
programme.desc: Un experimento genético genera a una hermosa mujer mutante que amenaza a la raza humana.

programme.title: Especie mortal II
programme.desc: Un extraterrestre en forma de parásito se incuba en el cuerpo de un astronauta. Justin Lazard, Natasha Henstridge, Marg Helgenberger, Michael Madsen, Mykelti Williamson. Director: Peter Medak.

programme.title: P2
programme.desc: Una mujer que es la última en salir de su oficina en la víspera de Navidad debe confiar en su ingenio para sobrevivir cuando está atrapada en un estacionamiento con un guardia de seguridad demente.

programme.title: Deathgasm
programme.desc: Dos estudiantes metaleros tocan una pieza musical prohibida que abre las puertas del infierno. Ahora los dos y una doncella de metal deben unir fuerzas para salvar a su ciudad de un ataque demoníaco.

programme.title: Tierra de vampiros II
programme.desc: Tras el asesinato de su familia, Martin se adentra en las tierras baldías de Estados Unidos en busca de Mister con la esperanza de volver a asociarse con él para combatir una nueva amenaza de vampiros.

programme.title: El beso del vampiro
programme.desc: Después de una noche de sexo apasionado donde le muerden en el cuello a un editor literario un poco desquiciado, se convence de que él es un vampiro y comienza a representar el papel.

programme.title: P2
programme.desc: Una mujer que es la última en salir de su oficina en la víspera de Navidad debe confiar en su ingenio para sobrevivir cuando está atrapada en un estacionamiento con un guardia de seguridad demente.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde esta el fantasma? 2
programme.desc: Malcolm, después de exorcizar los demonios de su ex, comienza de nuevo con su nueva novia y sus dos hijos. Después de mudarse a la casa de sus sueños, Malcolm está una vez más plagado de extraños eventos paranormales.

programme.title: Evolución
programme.desc: Un recluta de bombero, dos profesores universitarios, y la geek científica enviada por el gobierno, luchan contra un organismo alienígena que ha evolucionado rápidamente desde que llegó a la tierra dentro de un meteorito.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el fantasma?
programme.desc: Cuando Malcolm deja que su novia Keisha se mude a su casa, siente que no están solos. Al grabar en video una serie de eventos paranormales, Malcolm se sorprende al descubrir que el amor de su vida está poseída demoníacamente por un espíritu maligno.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde esta el fantasma? 2
programme.desc: Malcolm, después de exorcizar los demonios de su ex, comienza de nuevo con su nueva novia y sus dos hijos. Después de mudarse a la casa de sus sueños, Malcolm está una vez más plagado de extraños eventos paranormales.

programme.title: Beavis y Butt-head, la película
programme.desc: Cuando se roban su televisión, Beavis y Butt-head emprenden camino en una hilarante película debut que le muestra a millones de fanáticos lo que ya saben: ¡Beavis y Butt-head son lo mejor!

programme.title: Pequeña gran vida
programme.desc: Gracias a un descubrimiento científico que permite encoger a los seres humanos, Paul y su esposa deciden hacerse pequeños y vivir en una comunidad miniatura. Paul sabe que algo grande les espera.

programme.title: Un mujeriego en apuros
programme.desc: Un vendedor de autos muy mujeriego se encuentra en apuros cuando enfrenta al esposo de una de sus amantes, enterado de lo que ocurre entre ambos.

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: A retired gunfighter, now a drifter determined to establish a peaceful life, comes to the aid of a homestead family threatened by a land baron and his hired gun.

programme.title: Quigley Down Under
programme.desc: A self-assured American sharpshooter moves to Australia in search of employment and finds work for a despotic land baron in the Australian outback.

programme.title: Gunfight at the O.K. Corral
programme.desc: Frontier lawman Wyatt Earp joins his three brothers in their feud against the villainous Clanton gang, a local clan of cattle thieves in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: A retired gunfighter, now a drifter determined to establish a peaceful life, comes to the aid of a homestead family threatened by a land baron and his hired gun.

programme.title: Sabata
programme.desc: Get ready for fast-paced, explosive action as Lee Van Cleef stars as Sabata, the mysterious, steely-eyed gunslinger who, after he discovers the masterminds behind an elaborate bank heist, imposes his bullet-laced brand of justice on a guilty town.

programme.title: Return Of Sabata
programme.desc: The great Lee Van Cleef ('Death Rides a Horse') returns as the famous freewheeling gunslinger Sabata. In this third and final go-round for the enigmatic sharpshooter, Sabata seeks revenge when a band of desperadoes bilks him out of $5,000.

programme.title: South Pacific
programme.desc: On a South Pacific island during World War II, love blooms between a young nurse and a secretive Frenchman who's being courted for a dangerous military mission.

programme.title: Paris When It Sizzles
programme.desc: Richard Quine directs George Axelrod's acerbic script (adapted from Julien Duvivier's La Fête à Henriette) in this romantic comedy that reunites William Holden and Audrey Hepburn for the first time since 1954's Sabrina.

programme.title: Houseboat
programme.desc: This Oscar®-nominated film has the legendary Cary Grant as a government attorney who can't seem to shake his bad fortune. Living on a houseboat, widowed and left with three unruly kids, he hires Sophia Loren as a governess.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programme.desc: Steve McQueen stars as a sophisticated but bored tycoon who pulls off a bank heist so stunning that even Boston's finest are baffled. Faye Dunaway is the sleek insurance investigator out to bring him in but who, ultimately, falls in love with him.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: Charlie is out of jail and on the make with a plan for the heist of the century. Aided by top criminal mastermind Mr Bridger, Charlie sets off with a team of villains and to lift $4,000,000 from under the noses of the Turin Polizei.

programme.title: Run Silent, Run Deep
programme.desc: The legendary Clark Gable and Burt Lancaster star in this gripping, classic military drama as a submarine commander (Gable) drives his men and his 1st officer (Lancaster) to the brink of mutiny in his quest to sink an enemy sub. Robert Wise directs.

programme.title: Kings Go Forth
programme.desc: In this riveting war-time drama that packs plenty of explosive excitement and fervent passion, Frank Sinatra and Tony Curtis battle their own prejudices after learning the woman (Natalie Wood) they both love is not exactly who she appears to be.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan convinces Klink that he is a great artist so that he can make a rendezvous in an art gallery.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Lord Chitterly, an English traitor who looks like the bumbling Colonel Crittendon, enters Stalag 13 with information for the Germans. Crittendon is made up to replace the Lord and fool the Germans.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Lord Chitterly, an English traitor who looks like the bumbling Colonel Crittendon, enters Stalag 13 with information for the Germans. Crittendon is made up to replace the Lord and fool the Germans. The real Lord escapes.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The heroes try to prevent the Gestapo from sending Klink and Schultz to the Russian front.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Schultz is now the temporary Kommandant of Stalag 13 and starts to abuse his new power.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and company tell a German mole, disguised as an American aviator, all about their operation.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Col. Hogan and his Heroes assist local resistance forces sabotage hidden explosive stashes the Gestapo plans to use to destroy bridges and other resources as the Nazis prepare to retreat from advancing Allied Forces.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Joy blossoms at the Sunshine Cab Co. when a triumphant Bobby Wheeler returns to proclaim that he's landed a TV series role. Louie, in his own charming way, puts a damper on the celebration.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The pretty new cabbie proves to be more than Alex can handle when she leaves the meter running, in an attempt to lure him into romance.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A young runaway wreaks havoc at the Sunshine Cab Co. when Alex and Elaine encourage the lad to return home. Jim wants to adopt him, and Louie wants the youngster jailed for not paying his fare.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Romance and merriment are on the menu for Tony and Alex when they double-date gorgeous twin models at a posh restaurant, only to have the intimate group grow to a crowd with the unwelcome additions of Jim and Alex's ex-wife.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude is looking forward to a smart dinner party but Walter gets home late, takes a nap, and wakes up grumpy and ready to battle.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: After a wild cocktail party, lasting most of the night, Walter faces a bad hangover and Maude's wrath -- but refuses to face the fact that he has a drinking problem.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: After slugging Maude when he was loaded the night before, Walter comes downstairs the next morning full of guilt and remorse and wallowing in self-pity. Although Walter has promised to stop drinking, a phone call from his office sets him off again.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter declares his own 'I Love You Day' holiday, but his plans to spend a romantic day with Maude are thwarted by Vivian, Maude's best friend, who insists on unloading her divorce-proceedings problems.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Vivian returns from a five-week vacation looking ten years younger, everyone -- with one exception, tells her how great she looks. Vivian accuses Maude of being jealous of her new, youthful look.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude has decided the only thing that can lift her spirits is a face-lift operation. Now, she's been away several weeks and the whole clan is waiting for the first look at the results.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria comes home from the doctor with some news: she's pregnant. This leads to a big argument between Archie and Mike so Mike decides to quit school and move out. Archie doesn't believe him until Mike gets a job in Detroit and plans on moving there.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Just before leaving on a flight to Europe, Mike's hippie friends need a place to stay for the night. Mike invites them to stay in the Bunker's living room, however, Archie objects citing that no unmarried couple will spend the night under his roof.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie discovers that a new family is moving to the neighborhood. He goes over to investigate, only to discover that the new family is black. Archie quickly hopes to round the neighborhood up and try to force the family out of the area.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith is all excited that she has been chosen for jury duty. When Archie realizes that she may be sequestered, he forbids her to be on the jury, wanting to keep her at home to cook and clean for him. When she is sequestered, Archie fends for himself.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie stays up all night, expecting a phone call from a security guard who has information. It seems his company is laying off and he fears he may lose his job. No one else in the Bunker household can sleep either and it turns into a three ring circus.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix and Oscar decide to hold their own "decathlon" to determine who is in better physical condition.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix reveals how he destroyed his own marriage by trying to save Oscar's.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix and Oscar share ownership of a new car, multiplying their differences.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) suspects a newly arrived short-order cook in town may be involved in the recent murder of a young prostitute. Virgil (Howard Rollins) thinks otherwise and is out to prove that a local criminal is to blame.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Virgil and his wife, Althea, are invited to attend services at an all-white church. While attending the service, the reverend collapses, dead at the foot of the pulpit. It seems that not everyone was happy with the pastor's integration plan.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: When Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) is informed that a death row prisoner wants him present at his execution, the chief struggles over whether capital punishment is cruel and unusual punishment or an appropriate sentence for the crime he committed.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Twelve years ago, Joanne (Lois Nettleton) convinced two friends to testify against their pimp for the murder of a prostitute. Now, three convicts escape from prison, and one of them is out for revenge against the women who sent him to prison.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Larry Wilson is a motorcycle cop who doesn't always use procedure. Instead he zeros on the point and rushes to it sometimes lacking caution. Stone is frustrated by the rambunctious officer, who happens also to be dating his daughter.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After receiving crank calls, a paranoid man fences in his home and keeps his wife and daughter sheltered. When he panics and shoots a cop who was guarding the house he covers by identifying an ex con. The paranoia now becomes real.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A former sex worker works undercover for Stone and Robbins by going back to work for the pimp who is responsible for the death of her friend and a police detective.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: As a dare to try to win a spot among a gang of high school thugs in the 1950's, Charley Belasco commits a crime that sends him to prison for 20 years. Upon his release, he goes on a murderous rampage to hunt down the high school thugs who spurned him.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A crime kingpin's son steals from his father by killing a cash courier. On the run, he turns state's evidence and comes under federal protection. Stone and Robbins want him for murder, while his father's hit man just wants him murdered.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix tries to help a nun who took a dying man's confession that he let an innocent man go to prison for murder, but finds the inmate insisting he is guilty.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Fellow private investigator Charlie Frome is killed by a hit-and-run driver, apparently while working on a case, and Joe Mannix decides to see if he can determine why Frome was murdered.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: An executive hires Mannix with the intent of having him killed upon recovering some stolen computer plans, because of a letter contained with them that incriminates him.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is hired by a woman from Cleveland named Marcia Inman to locate her missing husband. Mannix investigates her husband's business contacts and follows a man matching his description after the man leaves what appears to be his mistress' apartment.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Pressure to get good grades at a private high school leads to the death of an instructor. The conspirators try to place the blame first on the victim's drinking and then on the black tennis coach.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three National Guardsmen explore the site of Custer's Last Stand and encounter mysterious phenomenon that hint at the original battle occurring just out of sight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Trying to keep up with his younger wife, Harmon convinces his brother to inject him with an experimental youth serum.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old man fears that he will die if his grandfather clock stops running.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bunny receives a ring from her fan club in her home town. In the ring she sees the faces of people from her hometown telling her she's needed there so she returns home.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Driving home one rainy evening, Oliver Pope accidentally hits a boy on a bicycle. Pope flees the scene, determined to hide his guilt, but his car has other ideas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Before leaving on his mission, an astronaut meets a woman. They fall in love...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man finds that he can trade anything he has, including youth and personality, with anybody else.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a future where everyone must undergo an operation at the age of 19 to make them identical to everyone else, one woman desperately tries to hang onto her own identity.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: A convict (Henry Silva) who is taking part in an inhabitant exchange between Earth and the planet Chromo discovers that the Chromites have something far more sinister planned and that the fate of the entire planet might just be in his own hands.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: Befuddled by the strange local custom of murder, two Martian administrators (Barry Morse and Carroll O'Connor) visit Earth to study one such crime and find themselves tempted to tamper with events in this whimsical tale from The Outer Limits.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: Film great Miriam Hopkins (1932's Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde) returns to the screen to give a show-stopping performance as an overly ripe flapper who will stop at nothing to complete her long-overdue wedding night scenario. John Hoyt also stars.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: When a queen bee transforms into an exotic young woman (Joanna Frank) and immediately aims her stinger at entomologist Ben Fields (Philip Abbott), she is determined to turn him (and all of mankind) into a human drone. Marsha Hunt also stars.

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Suki discovers what Barnabas is and divulges his secret to Nathan before she dies.

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Joshua and Naomi fear Josette will die the next day as recorded in the Collins family history book.

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Josette is beckoned by Angelique to Widows' Hill, where she sees a terrifying vision of herself.

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Millicent sees Barnabas in the graveyard. She informs Joshua that Barnabas ran away from her.

programme.title: Dark Shadows

programme.desc: Inspired by Kinjou's words, the three first years and Makishima race up the mountain to catch Hakone Academy; Naruko the Sprinter begins pulling for his team.

programme.title: Yowamushi Pedal Grande Road
programme.desc: Sohoku catches up to Hakone Academy during the mountain stage, but Naruko is exhausted and collapses; Imaizumi makes an announcement.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las mujeres en una ciudad de Louisiana viven con el temor de un violador que no deja pistas sobre su identidad. Pero la tecnología y la ciencia del comportamiento se combinan para brindar a la policía una nueva herramienta forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, la joven madre Tammy Tatum fue encontrada agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su departamento de Longmont, Colorado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuatro caminos
programme.desc: Una mujer nativa americana fue brutalmente asesinada en el desierto de Nuevo México y la escena del crimen estaba llena de evidencia forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A Prueba de Fuego
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie inicia varios incendios que causan daños por un valor de millones de dólares y la muerte de tres personas. Él es descubierto, en parte, mediante el uso de hipnosis forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía descubre un carro agujereado de balas, un conductor extraviado y ningún testigo. ¿Será que la víctima fue raptada o ha sido asesinada?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una estudiante de último año de la universidad fue violada y asesinada cerca de un sendero sin pavimentar utilizado por los estudiantes para caminar de un lado del campus al otro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Plato frío
programme.desc: Un hombre murió en su casa después de una larga historia de enfermedad cardíaca. Se asumió que esta fue la causa de su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Programado para el desastre
programme.desc: Una mujer de 29 años murió instantáneamente cuando una bomba explotó en su casa. El dispositivo era tan poderoso que la metralla estaba incrustada en las casas al otro lado de la calle.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Atormentada por la desaparición de su madre, una joven emprendió su propia investigación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los residentes de Noel, Missouri, se sorprendieron al enterarse de que su banco había sido asaltado y el presidente del banco había desaparecido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El infiel
programme.desc: Walter Notheis, Jr. era mejor conocido al público Americano como el entretenedor, Walter Scott, vocalista principal de la banda, Bob Kuban and the In-Men. Walter no sabía que la canción sería una premonición de los eventos que llevarían a su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una peluquera joven y atractiva fue agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su propio salón de belleza. La evidencia en la escena del crimen no coincidió con ninguno de los sospechosos y, después de la investigación inicial, el caso se archivó por diez años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Este episodio documenta un atentado mortal en una iglesia en Oakwood, Illinois, en diciembre de 1997.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pista elemental
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres del mismo pueblo fueron asesinadas de la misma manera, la policía temió que un asesino en serie estuviera suelto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Rosemary Anderson es encontrada muerta a un lado de la carretera, su novio se convierte en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Noticia de última hora
programme.desc: Una joven productora de noticias de televisión es violada y asesinada en su apartamento. La policía identifica a dos sospechosos, pero ambos son absueltos de cualquier delito.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una joven fue encontrada muerta, la policía arrestó rápidamente al sospechoso más probable. Pero la tecnología de punta de la NASA permitió a un odontólogo forense demostrar que el hombre equivocado estaba tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Enamorado mortal
programme.desc: Un obstetra regresó a casa del hospital y encontró a su esposa en el piso del baño. Estaba cubierta de sangre y no respiraba.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fiebre del oro
programme.desc: El despacho de emergencia recibió una llamada de un hombre que dijo que su novia se disparó y se suicidó. La autopsia reveló que la herida de bala no fue autoinfligida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando la policía encuentra el cuerpo de Krista Harrison, de 11 años, hay pocas pistas sobre la identidad del asesino. Pero las autoridades están intrigadas por las inusuales fibras naranjas incrustadas en la ropa que se encuentran cerca de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, la policía de San Diego está desconcertada por un par de manos encontradas en un contenedor de basura. A través de una investigación adicional, determinan que las manos son las de la persona desaparecida Don Hardin.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos residentes de Seattle mueren después de tomar un analgésico de venta libre. El análisis de laboratorio de las pastillas muestra que estaban contaminadas con una concentración letal de cianuro. Originalmente lanzado como Temporada 2, Episodio 9.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Por lo general, es fácil determinar cómo un criminal entró en la escena del crimen. Pero en este caso, estaba lejos de esclarecerse. Parecía que el asesino se desvaneció y quizá lo hizo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una modelo aspirante apareció muerta y el sospechoso principal fue su novio. Cuando finalmente se le dio el visto bueno, los investigadores tuvieron que buscar más profundamente para poder encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una estudiante universitaria desaparece, sus compañeros de clase estaban preocupados por la seguridad de ella y la de ellos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Jardín del mal
programme.desc: Cuando un popular disc jockey fue encontrado asesinado en un jardín comunitario, la policía entró en acción.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encuentra a una mujer muerta en el piso del cuarto de su apartamento.

programme.desc: Feeling ignored on Student Council, Emma finds a way to get her voice heard when she takes up a new cause - ganging up with the cool kids to keep Terri’s abusive ex-boyfriend Rick, out of Degrassi.

programme.desc: Still able to influence Tegan from its 'inside world', the Mara set the TARDIS co-ordinates for Manuusa, his home world, where he hopes to re-establish his power.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Snakedance
programme.desc: As the festivities begin, nothing seemingly stands between the Mara and its spectacular return... except the Doctor and a crazy old man in the mountains.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Mawdryn Undead
programme.desc: Caught in a warp ellipse, the TARDIS is drawn to a huge spacecraft orbiting Earth whereupon the Doctor is separated in space and time from Nyssa and Tegan.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Mawdryn Undead
programme.desc: At Brendon School, the Doctor enlists the help of the Brigadier. At Brendon School, Tegan enlists the help of the Brigadier. Same man, different time periods, however.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Mawdryn Undead
programme.desc: Mawdryn and his eternal mutants are awake and reveal the truth, they are exiles, they are in pain and need something only the Doctor can give them. His future lives.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Mawdryn Undead

programme.title: Doctor Who: The King's Demons

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Five Doctors

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Five Doctors

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Five Doctors

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Five Doctors
programme.desc: The Doctors confront the traitor in Rassilon's Tomb, but even victory will have consequences for the Doctor.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two troubled dogs, and their families, win sessions with Cesar after auditioning at a pet store in Orange County, Calif.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A German shepherd and Welsh corgi mix has dog aggression; a blind Lab chases his tail when he is around food.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive bulldog; a beagle/terrier mix with a fear of trash cans; a Lab mix who starts to exhibit anxiety outside.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A pit bull is aggressive toward strangers; a Rottweiler/Shar-Pei mix must get his aggression under control or be euthanized.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A ridgeback/boxer mix's high energy develops into severe aggression; a couple's whippets bark and lunge at any dog that comes inside the boutique.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps the owner of a grooming business deal with difficult canine clients; a Chihuahua has a barking problem.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie is overprotective of his owner; a German shepherd is aggressive toward other dogs and people.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps comedians Skyler Stone, Ralphie May and Paul Rodriguez get to grips with their unruly hounds.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps dogs overcome their fears including a whippet mix who is blind and deaf, a labradoodle that fears the ocean, and a cocker spaniel that fears all humans.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar meets NASCAR driver Kevin Harvick to help with his snappy Chihuahua and an aggressive Pekingese called Gizmo.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps fitness guru Jillian Michaels with her aggressive Chihuahua, while "Frasier" star Kelsey Grammer needs help house-training his dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Holly, a Labrador puppy, displays severe food aggression; a women's shelter will take a needy woman and her pit bull, Tucker, but Cesar must help the dog become less protective first.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery: Daphne's cosigner on her bond and ex-boyfriend, Bobby, has just committed suicide.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community, where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids, and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit of this case takes them into some parts of Oahu, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds, and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble--or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado, and they face a special challenge--getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team are back in Colorado hunting bounties. Today's fugitive has a long rap sheet and a reputation for packing heat. With nothing but an address and phone number, the team heads out on the hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court, and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow, Dog turns to the fugitive's on again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today with another well-established bail bonding family. And in fact, as Dog's fame has grown, so have his responsibilities. So in addition to tracking down two felons on the lam, Dog has to prepare for a good.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is confronted with two alleged felons who are in crisis. Family and friends of these bondees are convinced that they are getting into further trouble while awaiting trial, so Dog and the posse have to bring these men back to jail.

programme.title: Pet Obsessed: To the Rescue
programme.desc: When the going gets tough, the pets get helpful.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian treats a seriously ill llama called Echo who isn't breathing well. After the tricky job of conducting his first llama chest X-rays, Julian can see there's fluid in Echo's lungs. And when he takes a sample, he doesn't like what he sees.

programme.title: 6 Puppies And Us
programme.desc: The first few weeks of having a puppy are probably the most challenging, and this episode throws us straight into funny and dramatic stories as our new puppies throw up a bewildering variety of challenges.

programme.title: Pet Obsessed: Road to Recovery
programme.desc: Pets are a great remedy for any ailment, and these ones especially will help on the road to recovery.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter tries to save a cow who has suffered a huge prolapse after giving birth. With the newborn calf depending on her mum, the pressure is on.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet

programme.title: It's a Vet's Life

programme.desc: Rob and Danielle head to Israel to rescue dogs from a shelter; a visit with the farm chickens.

programme.desc: The Morris-Higginson family is looking for a brand new puppy for their three puppy-loving daughters. While visiting the Australian Shepherd, the Labrador Retriever and the Petite Basset Griffon Vandeen- will the three girls each want a different breed?

programme.title: To The Rescue
programme.desc: Tommy explores service dog training at the Patriotic Service Dog Foundation. These dogs provide companionship and peace to veterans and first responders, giving their humans a new purpose.

programme.desc: Peter treats a lamb with a leg infection while Julian deals with a mysterious lump on a llama called Imposter. A greyhound with a crushed ankle receives an implant.

programme.desc: Steven and Claudia marry, and the judge dismisses the custody suit; Blake offers Krystle a public relations job; Adam tricks Alexis into signing blank documents; Fallon and Jeff uncover evidence suggesting Adam may have poisoned Jeff.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Tate tasks Dre to kill Ghost; Tate's hatred toward St. Patrick motivates him to lie during a Federal questioning; the Feds are in striking distance of convicting St. Patrick for Silver's murder.

programme.title: Power

programme.desc: Brooke and Jess investigate the disappearance of an FBI cadet.

programme.desc: Jess battles insomnia; pressure builds to find a serial killer's next victim before time runs out.

programme.desc: Parents of a teenage girl disappear from a highway gas station.

programme.desc: Jess and Brooke investigate the disappearance of a woman from a plane while in flight.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa y Cristóbal viven un dulce sueño de amor del que no querrán despertar, pero Sara no está dispuesta a dejarle el camino fácil a la nueva rival y le declara la guerra. La presencia de Marisa se convierte en un problema de seguridad de estado.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa le dice a Cristóbal que llegó el momento de la verdad. Sara descubre la identidad de Marisa y monta un plan para incriminarla, mientras a Cristóbal le urge actuar para evitar que el fraude del laboratorio farmacéutico afecte su reputación.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia quiere ayudar a Justino, pero tiene que aguantar amenazas. Sebastián toma una decisión sobre los gemelos, contra la voluntad de Perfecta, que lo obliga a estar más cerca del pueblo.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
