programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing in either end of two large cylinders, suspended in the air over water. Player must grab a mouth full of insects, then place into a meat grinder using their mouth. Inside the tanker truck, it would be filled with water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are placed in a box with two plexi-glass walls that will be lifted off the ground. Contestants will be served live snails. Contestants are seated in a car that is in the back of a semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be dangling from a rope off the roof. Contestants will have to clear a bug splattered car windshield using only their mouth and face. The contestant will be standing on a beam suspended from a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will stand on top of a truck as it speeds trying to grab as many flags. Contestants will shoot potatoes at a target using a shoulder mounted air cannon. The contestant must start the car, there are tractors driving towards their car.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The parent and the child will have to cross a beam above the water releasing flags along the way. Cockroaches are being poured into the box while the child sits in a box without a top. In this family stunt the child will start by standing on the dock.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A contestant will be seated in the driver's seat of a limousine, the second contestant will be in the trunk. The contestant will be tied into their seat and to the steering wheel of a automobile.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be laying on their back on a plexi-glass platform that is hung from a helicopter. Contestants will determine how much of the animals they will have to eat. Contestant will have to cross beams placing flags along the way.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be locked in a plexi-glass box that will be hung from a crane, lowered into the water. A contestant bobs into a tank of fluid. One will be driving the main car and the other will be driving the ramp car along a flatbed semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants sit on a bicycle on top of one of two semi trucks. Contestants have to pick up hornworms and squeeze the juice out into a glass. Contestant must walk on beam from one building to another.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be riding on the back of a jet ski. Contestant is placed in a Plexiglas helmet, which is then filled with moray eels. Contestants must ride a platform that is continuously moving and retrieve a flag and return to the moving platform.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be bound face to face by their wrists to a poll attached to a plexi-glass platform. Contestants are placed into a Plexiglas helmet filled with spiders. Couples will be standing and bound by their ankles to a platform attached to a lever.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be strapped by their waist, ankles, and wrist and locked to the face of a wheel, halfway into the water. Contestants will shoot at wall of bottles with a paintball gun. Contestant must stand on a swaying platform hanging from a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will walk across a truss suspended above the ground wearing a chain mail suit. Contestants will shoot a flaming arrow from a cross bow at a scarecrow target. Contestant is secured into an upright coffin, filled with bugs.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will climb out of the moving tram and grab a net attached to the tram. Contestants will drink a shake consisting of rats. A plexi-glass wall with a lip hangs under the helicopter and they must traverse the wall releasing flags along the way.

programme.desc: When a stakeout marred by mob interference results in the death of an innocent bystander and a police cover-up, a Chicago detective is forced to adhere to his own personal code of ethics in an effort to rid the Windy City of its Warring crime factions.

programme.title: Lone Wolf McQuade
programme.desc: A maverick Texas Ranger throws down his guns to indulge his talents in the martial arts when he meets his match in the leader of a gun-smuggling ring.

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is back in this action-packed martial arts showcase co-starring the legendary Lee Van Cleef. Norris takes on his adoptive brother and a training camp where terrorists are being taught the secret killing techniques of the ninja!

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike is a tough hitman, who makes his hits look like accidents or suicide. He's in a gang of hitmen, each with his own style. When his loved ex is killed, Mike looks for those responsible.

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Kumar fue a Santiago de Surco y había un pez que logró llamar su atención llamado chiri. Lo probará en tres platos diferentes para ver cómo queda. ¡Veamos el resultado!

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Breña es un distrito reconocido en Lima y nuestro carismático chef Kumar Paredes acudió a uno de los mercados de este distrito en busca de peje blanco. Seamos testigos de esta aventura.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay viaja a Los Ángeles para inspeccionar Sante La Brea. Descubre a un propietario con problemas financieros que no es respetado por su personal.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Cuando el Chef Ramsay regresa a Finn McCool's, The Olde Stone Mill, The Mixing Bowl, Dillon's, Campania's y Peter's, encuentra restaurantes salvados del borde del desastre.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Casa Roma en Lancaster, California. Aunque su barra está repleta, el comedor de Casa Roma está vacío.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Mojito's, un restaurante cubano en Brooklyn. Los dueños compraron el restaurante como recién casados, pero ahora tienen siete años de un matrimonio y un negocio que se desmorona.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Ridgewood, Nueva Jersey, para rejuvenecer a Bazzini, un restaurante italiano obstaculizado por un servicio lento y un personal de cocina mediocre.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Nueva Jersey, el chef Ramsay visita Flamango's, un restaurante obsoleto que necesita ayuda.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Filadelfia, Pensilvania, para visitar Hot Potato Cafe. Encuentra a un dueño agotado por la pasión que ha creado un ambiente tóxico lleno de negatividad.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: Francesco de Sanctis visita el mercado número 1 en Surquillo para comprar provisiones para una deliciosa causa de arracacha con tartar de pescado.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: El chef Francesco de Sanctis prepara un delicioso sándwich de pollo sibarita. Es un innovador y poderoso fuera del menú.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: Francesco de Sanctis prepara fuera del menú un plato a la italiana, un espagueti con calamares rellenos acompañado de un refrescante cóctel.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: Nuestro chef, Francesco de Sanctis, mezcla un plato marino e influenciado por la comida italiana y nos sorprende con un versus de tiraditos perico estilo caprese y salsa de maracuyá.

programme.title: Taste Of The Country
programme.desc: La nieve finalmente ha caído en South Pond y para que la gente se enamore de la belleza invernal de la granja, Danielle organiza un día de nieve con un tema del día de San Valentín.

programme.title: Taste Of The Country
programme.desc: Danielle organiza una boda a finales de verano de su manera favorita: estilo campestre con arreglos rústicos de flores silvestres en los pasillos y un festín de productos locales frescos de los campos para que el día sea un evento mágico.

programme.title: Taste Of The Country
programme.desc: Se trata de chuparse los dedos lentamente, cocinando las bondades caseras mientras Danielle organiza un evento de barbacoa en Texas en el granero adornado con parafernalia de vaqueros y flores de campo.

programme.title: Taste Of The Country
programme.desc: South Pond entra a probar una tarta de mantequilla en el mercado de agricultores y celebra su primer evento de degustación de cerveza, elaborando cinco deliciosos aperitivos del tamaño de un bocado para degustar junto con cervezas locales.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: El chef Spencer Watts está haciendo una deliciosa fiesta griega en aproximadamente 30 minutos, por menos de $30.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent overdose suicide of Reverend Bill Guthrie's wife, detectives recover incriminating files from Bill's computer and learn of his infidelity.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Genell Plude is found dead in her bathroom, the scene points to suicide. But a coroner's inquest and a unique application of forensic science give investigators a different explanation for her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators are baffled after finding a murder scene devoid of any physical evidence, but they suspect that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime. If so, forensic scientists would have to find some way to learn what the dog had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends had no proof of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than thirty times and the crime scene was awash with her blood. Near her head, police discovered a distinctive button with strands of thread still attached.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why a young scientist has fallen gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Shamaia Smith disappears from a strip club in East Hartford, CT. Police consider various patrons of the club, but focus on local businessman Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe print, several foreign hairs and unknown fingerprints at a murder scene. But they believe the most telling piece of evidence is the bite mark on the victim's chest.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Paul Gruber's daughter suspected something was wrong when she received birthday cards addressed from her father, but written in a stranger's handwriting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Faced with three homicides that appear to be professional executions, investigators on both sides of the Atlantic must find a common thread between the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb rips through a rural home, police have no idea who is responsible. A 9-volt battery and the remnants of a mailing label ead investigators to the man who made the bomb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When heart surgeon Darryl Sutorius is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home, police assume he committed suicide. Further investigation reveals that his new wife Della has a history of violence and an insatiable desire for money.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered among garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Seattle police had no suspects in the violent murder of grunge singer Mia Zapata. More than a decade passed before evidence collected by a prescient medical examiner could be used by forensic scientists to identify the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears and her husband becomes the prime suspect — especially after police find a huge bloodstain on the carpet of their bedroom. When they spray the bedroom with Luminol, they discover it was awash with blood spatter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Chris Ochoa confessed to the 1988 rape and murder of Nancy DePriest, the case was closed. 8 years later, Achim Marino confessed to the same crime. Can DNA evidence identify the real perpetrator?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular gym teacher is found dead of what appears to be an accidental gunshot wound, his family is suspicious. A tape recorded by the victim just before his death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in her apartment. With little evidence at the scene, the case turns cold — until police discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a windy Kansas night in 1995, a mysterious fire swept through the home of a prominent doctor. In the debris, investigators found evidence which told them how the fire started.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was brutally murdered in her home and the only witnesses to the crime were the family dogs. An expert in canine behavior was convinced the killer knew both the victim and the animals, and he was determined find out what the dogs had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse is stabbed to death. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, but a bloody fingerprint reveals that he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Zen-Aku battles the Rangers with his own evil Wild Zords.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Jindrax and Toxica hijack a bus full of innocents to coerce Max into giving up his Animal Crystal.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Taylor and the Rangers rally to rescue Princess Shayla from Zen-Aku.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Worried that Zen-Aku's memory is returning to him, Nayzor coerces him into attacking the Power Rangers with their own Zords.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: The Rangers learn Zen-Aku's true identity and how he became an evil warrior for the Orgs.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: The ancient Animarian warrior Merrick fights to atone for his past misdeeds.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: The mysterious new Org General Necronomica fights the Rangers while Merrick finds a new home.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Alyssa helps Cole search for information on his long-lost parents while Master Org tries to hide his past from Jindrax and Toxica.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Max tries to regain the respect of his former bowling mentor in order to help him defeat a peculiar new Org.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Danny competes with a wealthy rival for Kendall while preventing the Wedding Dress Org from capturing Turtle Cove's brides to be.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Alyssa must rely on her martial arts heritage when the Rangers come up against Samurai Org.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: The especially powerful Tombstone Org tries to send the Rangers six feet under while Merrick and the Princess try to appease the only Zord capable of saving them.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Nayzor returns more powerful than ever requiring the Rangers to quest across time and space to find a new Zord's help.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: The Wild Force Rangers join forces with the Silver Guardians to stop three time-traveling monsters from the year 3001.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: The Power Ranges Time Force travel back in time to help the Power Rangers Wild Force, to prevent the three Mut-Orgs from joining forces with Master Org.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Cole learns the truth about his parents when Master Org reveals his sinister origin to the Wild Force Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Merrick must confront a demon from his past when Zen-Aku returns to claim his soul.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Cole must protect Kite, a young boy alone in the city, as Mandilok, the new Org General, discovers a taste for new buildings.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Princess Shayla and Merrick argue as the Flute Org's music ruins their song, causing the Rangers to dance uncontrollably.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: While Max and Taylor help Kite look for his home, they are attacked by Jindrax and his brother Juggelo at an amusement park.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: The Lion Tamer Org takes control of the Wild Zords and turns them against the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Kite finally remembers his past as he grows dissatisfied with mankind's disregard for nature.

programme.desc: Ronny runs into a stubborn obstacle named Will while trying to throw a Halloween party. When she is captured to power Moltor and the Fearcats's latest weapon, can Will steal her back?

programme.desc: Janet is commissioned to take portraits of Shannon's cats. Umma entrusts Jung to pick Appa up from the dentist, but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky books a two-month summer job in Maine and decides to take Lucy and Little Ricky. For the summer, they want to sublet their apartment at a profit, but their friends and landlords, the Mertzes, are not in favor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo hires business manager Mr. Hickox to solve the family budget problems. Lucy, dissatisfied with her new $5 per month allowance, manages to find a loophole in the business manager's system.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy agrees to help her neighbor Fred Mertz impress an old vaudeville buddy who's in town for a visit. Lucy poses as the Mertzes maid "Bessie" to make Barney Kurtz believe Fred hit it big in real estate.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feigns a crisis to test Ricky's love after hearing a story about a woman whose husband ignored her pleas for help while being robbed—she assumes Ricky would turn his back on her too.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy plays Cupid and tries to bag a bachelor for a husband-hungry girlfriend. Lucy organizes an evening to show her unmarried friends, Dorothy and Sam, how wonderful marriage is.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky agrees reluctantly to host a new television show, sponsored by Phipps Department Store, and learns they'd like him to host with his wife Lucy. When Lucy finds out that Ricky didn't want her in the show, she sets out to sabotage the program.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ben Benjamin arrives at the Ricardos' apartment, Lucy mistakes Ben Benjamin, a Hollywood talent scout, for a burglar and nearly ruins Ricky's chance for a film career.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy travels with Ricky to Hollywood for his big screen test and gets excited about the possibility of living there. According to industry insiders, Ricky is a candidate for the lead role in "Don Juan".

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Ricardo meets her Spanish-speaking mother-in-law for the first time and her efforts to be a gracious host turn disastrous. Lucy's inability to speak Spanish and her in-law's inability to understand Lucy's pantomime erects a wall of misunderstanding.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Despite the reservations of her husband, Lucy decides to help Fred pick out a birthday present for Ethel. She picks out a pair of toreador pants, which Ethel thinks are unflattering as well as too big.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo paces the floor, awaiting word from Hollywood about his screen test. Lucy can't use the phone for fear the line will be busy when Ben Benjamin tries to call for Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A movie contract for Ricky necessitates a change in scenery and the hanging of a "for rent" sign on the Ricardos' New York home. The Mertzes, willing to give up tenants but not friends, sign on for the trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For their trip out west, Ricky buys a new car to replace the old, beat-up one Fred bought. Lucy convinces her husband to teach her how to drive it. After one driving lesson, Ricky is a harried and beaten man.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's mother wants to join the Ricardos on their road trip out west. As anticipated, Ricky blows his stack when he hears that Lucy's mother wants to go along, and continues to complain that everyone's going on the trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes have a hard time finding accommodations that will please everyone on their trip to California. Ricky is driving and sacrifices his passengers' appetites for the sake of making mileage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes are arrested when they're caught speeding in Bent Fork, Tennessee. Although Ricky just wants to pay the fine, Lucy protests that they are being treated unfairly.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes, on the last leg of their NY-to-Hollywood motor trek, stop at Ethel's hometown of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Under the impression that Ethel has been called to Hollywood by the movies, the townsfolk give her the star treatment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After five weeks on the road driving across the country, the Ricardos and the Mertzes arrive at their destination – Hollywood. With stars in her eyes, Lucy heads for the Brown Derby, a restaurant frequented by celebrities, with Ethel and Fred in tow.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is jealous when Ricky is asked to pose with five beautiful starlets for publicity photos and tries to get herself in on the action by inserting herself into every shot. Lucy is even more upset when Ricky goes to his first Hollywood premiere.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is desperate to appear in a Hollywood movie after hearing the Mertzes have bit parts in an upcoming feature. She sets out to be "discovered" and lands a part in an MGM musical. She plays a showgirl in a glamorous nightclub scene but has some trouble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy convinces Ricky to allow her to buy a Don Loper dress so she'll fit in with the Hollywood scene. Lucy and Ethel hit the couturier's salon but soon realize the dresses are way out of their price range.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy arrives in Hollywood with Little Ricky to meet her husband and his new press agent, who intends on making Ricky the "Cuban Liberace." Charlie Pomerantz plans a publicity stunt he hopes will get Ricky into Hedda Hopper's gossip column.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns her husband's film Don Juan will be shelved and works frantically with the Mertzes and Mrs. McGillicuddy to prevent it from happening. Together they write hundreds of fan letters and dress up as members of the Ricky Ricardo Fan Club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy has agreed to write an article entitled "What It's Like To Be Married To Ricky Ricardo" for a magazine when she learns from Ricky's press agent that Ricky is going to host a TV show. Lucy desperately wants to appear on the show with Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky forgot the date of his 15th anniversary and desperately wires the records department in Greenwich, Connecticut where they were married to find out. In his defense, Ricky tells Lucy that he's already planned a big "surprise" anniversary party.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns a movie star, Cornel Wilde, is staying in the penthouse directly above the Ricardos' apartment and sets out to catch a glimpse of the handsome actor.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: Michael Jackson: Remember the King
programme.desc: There are very few artists who have obsessed the world as Michael Jackson did. Now musical royalty, his singles topped the charts all over the globe, selling over 350 million records whilst holding the record for the best selling album of all time.

programme.title: Olivia Newton John: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Olivia Newton-John amassed three Grammys and eight American Music Awards.

programme.title: Prince: Purple Reign
programme.desc: In recent times, music lovers have been confounded with the tragic and shocking news that some of their most beloved stars had passed away in controversial circumstances.

programme.title: Days of Rage: The Rolling Stones' Road to Altamont
programme.desc: As the dream of peace and love was shattered in the late 1960s amidst riots, assassinations and war, The Rolling Stones became a defiant voice in this turbulent era, which came to a shocking end at the Altamont festival.

programme.title: Rolling Stone: Life And Death Of Brian Jones
programme.desc: Night Flight Presents: Exploring the rise of Brian Jones and the Rolling Stones as well as the untimely death of Jones; Garcia paints an interesting and revealing picture of doomed pop star.

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: Sweet Summer Sun - Hyde Park Live
programme.desc: This live concert film showcases The Rolling Stones' triumphant return to Hyde Park, London. Featuring performances from Mick Jagger himself.

programme.title: The Story of the Rolling Stones
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones are one of the greatest and most influential rock bands of our time having sold in excess of 200 million records worldwide. This fascinating programme tells the story of the early days of the band and how they became The Stones.

programme.title: Mick & Keith
programme.desc: Mick Jagger and Keith Richards often considered as pioneers of rock music genre. Without their unique contribution to music, the contemporary landscape would be very different and it is this originality which has set them apart.

programme.title: Mick Jagger: A Knight to Remember
programme.desc: There has never been a rock and roll star quite like Mick Jagger. He is the voice of a generation. He is a successful musician, artist, actor, movie producer and business man. Relive the life and career of the face of the Rolling Stones.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race

programme.title: The A-List: Dallas
programme.desc: Hey y'all! The drama continues in Dallas.

programme.title: The A-List: Dallas
programme.desc: The A-Listers discover that someone isn't being completely honest.

programme.title: The A-List: Dallas
programme.desc: He did what?! One of the A-Listers decides to come forward with the truth.

programme.title: The A-List: Dallas
programme.desc: Fresh off the heels of his blowout fight with Phillip, James licks his wounds and tries to navigate the aftermath with his friends. However, things don't patch up so easily for James: Ashley won't stop texting him, and he is "dead" to Phillip.

programme.title: The A-List: Dallas
programme.desc: Looks like Levi has got his hands full yet again. Combine a needy new boyfriend, an upcoming rodeo competition and Ashley's new charity - it's a wonder he has any free time at all! Will Chase be able to rope Levi into a full-time relationship?

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Lyrica takes steps to bring peace between the two mothers. Moniece is on a mission to find the source of the sex tape leak. Princess has issues with Ray and Sonja leading up to the marriage. Teairra is forced to face her demons.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Wedding week is here! Ray and Princess are still at odds and it's unclear if they'll make it down the aisle. Teairra realizes the gravity of her legal and personal problems.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: The cast of Love & Hip Hop Hollywood reunites as host Nina Parker dives into all of the drama from Season 3. Moniece crosses the line on Brandi's family. Nikki reveals if she's with Rosa or Safaree and a guest sends Masika for the exit.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: The drama continues on part two of The Reunion when Masika and Hazel face off. We find out what was in Willie and Kyesha's texts. Moniece shocks everyone when she alleges one of the fellas has a baby with a side chick.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Keyshia Cole confronts unresolved issues with her estranged husband Booby. Chaos erupts when Hazel-E squares off against her haters. A new arrival threatens to turn Masika's world upside-down. Teairra's lunch date goes all the way left.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Ray J's struggle to start a family leads to an outrageous bet with A1 and Safaree. Keyshia gets advice from Too Short. Nikki Baby connects Chanel West Coast with a producer. Brooke goes on a mission to uncover the truth about Marcus.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Teairra's new man clashes with her social circle. Chanel leaps to her friend's defense at Safaree's party. Ray J's secret weighs on his conscience. Lyrica issues a startling demand to A1. Alexis and Solo's relationship hits a snag.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Masika hires Misster Ray to plan an event, only to get caught in the crossfire. Concerns mount over Teairra's self-destructive behavior. A1 considers a collaboration with Keyshia Cole. Brooke and Booby hatch a plan to teach Marcus a lesson.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Mayhem erupts at Safaree and Chanel's music video shoot. Misster Ray's attempt to make nice with Masika leads to a wild encounter with Zell. A betrayed Teairra lashes out at Cisco, Moniece, and Nia. Keyshia gets caught in the middle of a marital spat.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Shocking allegations blow up Masika and Nia's dinner for Zell and Misster Ray. Teairra and Cisco's shopping trip ends in tears. Moniece struggles with 'the other woman' in her relationship. Booby worries about Keyshia's response to his latest move.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: The Hollywood women are forced to pick sides in a war between cliques. Ray J's effort to develop a sexy new image for Bridget Kelly puts a strain on his marriage. Moniece squares off with A.D.'s best friend. Teairra learns the ugly truth about Cisco.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Moniece and Alexis' social media beef spills into the streets. Teairra's behavior at Nikki Baby's event leads to an emotional confrontation. Brooke and Booby cause a stir at Lyrica's listening party. Ray J shows Princess he's ready for fatherhood.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Teairra makes a critical decision about her future. Warring cliques unite in an effort to end the conflict between Masika and Alexis. Marcus confronts Brooke and Booby. Zell sabotages the launch party for Misster Ray's P.R. company.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Brooke fends off competition for Booby. Tiffany exposes cracks in Moniece and A.D.'s relationship. Hazel's mom urges her to go after a real baller. A1 teaches Chanel a lesson in karma. Marcus and Bridget have a secret encounter.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood
programme.desc: Masika cozies up to Berg, igniting a fire in Hazel. Ray J tries to move forward after his arrest. Nikki is ambushed with the discovery that Masika is the face of her friend's strip club. Fizz & Amanda remain on the rocks.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The world's largest diamond has been discovered in South Africa and Lupin has his eyes on the prize. But as it turns out, stealing it is the easy part!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko decides to marry Huffner for his jewelry collection, disregarding the rumor that Huffner's brides always die a mysterious death within a few weeks of their wedding. Turns out, he's also a collector of brides and likes them permanently preserved!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen receives a letter from Sister Angelica and heads to the African country of Borodias. Sister Angelica wants Jigen's help to rescue Dr. Othello, the leader of the country's independence movement.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO tries a different approach to capturing Lupin: Astrology. It enlists the help of Marianne, a clairvoyant who can read Lupin's actions using astrological predictions and her crystal ball.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko calls Lupin from Professor Pot's lab, but since Lupin is half-asleep, Jigen takes the call instead. Fujiko claims Professor Pot has accidentally invented a robot that manufactures diamonds, but Jigen doesn't believe a word she says and hangs up.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko has invited Lupin and company to a classical concert conducted by Kyoransky from the International Philharmonic. After they get a good look at Kyoransky's baton, studded with a a diamond worth at least 200 million yen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin goes to prison intent on making Silver tell what he did with the loot, only to discover that a new top-of-the-line prison was built over the site where he hid the money. Will the operation to trade an execution for the recovery of the money succeed?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the Golden Bell, symbol of the monarchy of Beltenberg and precious tourist attraction. However, the bell that sparkles in the belfry is just a brass replica.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata is taken hostage from ICPO headquarters. The terrorists demand to swap him with their boss Napoleon XI, but ICPO refuses. Since Zenigata is no further use to them, the terrorists are bound to kill him; but Lupin is to the rescue?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Smith Gang hit-man company was once the best in the business, but they're suffering now from tough competition. Though the company chairman Smith considers running TV ads to revive his business, he can't think of a good way to do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joe Spade was once a formidable hitman of renown and Jigen's sharpshooter coach, he now comes to beg for Jigen's help; he had gotten old, flubbed a hit contract, and is now on the run.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: ICPO Bureau Chief Jasmine is an able commissioner. She uses the governor to spur Zenigata into action, as she has a secret plan to arrest Lupin. But Jasmine's plan is to make this mission her very last at ICPO so she could get married.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Nightlight Mask murdered the Duke of Le Mond and stole his diamonds. ICPO is having trouble solving the case, so they induct mystery author Conan Dorill as a special inspector. Dorill deduces that the true identity of Nightlight Mask is Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a night of thunder and rain, a man gives Lupin a doll. The next day there is a news report that a diamond called the Phoenix's Tear had been stolen. Lupin's been caught on security cameras, but he has no recollection of having done the deed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's target is the Vatican Crown, located at the North Pole. He devises a plan to thwart pesky Fujiko, which is to relocate penguins at the South Pole to the North Pole.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The World Crime Prevention Devices Association has developed the "killer safe" that sent many safe crackers to their graves. But Lupin takes the challenge to steal what it guards.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin crashes crime boss Markane's masquerade party, but the party was just a ruse to entrap Lupin. Lupin gets hung by rope in the dark and is made the target of Markane's murder game in ten rounds, of which players have to hit the target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin gets called out to New York where he rescues a girl hunted by an organization called Red Spider. Lupin does everything he can to help the poor girl suffering from amnesia; he tries hypnosis on her but to no avail, he gets hypnotized instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Old man Piccolo had taught Lupin the art of thievery 15 years ago. Learning that his widowed wife had all of her belongings impounded by the police, Lupin promises her to get them all back.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew sneak into Peking's Imperial Palace Museum to steal Emperor Shi's jade Mahjong set, but winds up getting chased by a gang.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Look who is flying above New York; it's Superman! All he does is fly around, but the town is in a panic because of his performance. In the meantime, a lot of banks get robbed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin steals a statue called the Stone Child from the Metropolitan Art Museum; he and Fujiko make their getaway in a Cessna, but they crash at the Bermuda Triangle. They encounter a ghost ship at this grave of many ships and planes.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Foodie and gourmet aficionado Baron Gourmel says he wants to eat Lupin's brain. He claims he'd offer his own 70-million dollar jewelry collection to anyone who could capture Lupin. Fujiko hears of it and informs Lupin right away.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin III learns that his grandfather Arsène Lupin's secret treasures are buried in his grave. Lupin learns of its location with Fujiko's microfilm.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are surrounded, as usual, as they are trying to escape after a jewelry theft. But somebody shoots at Zenigata and hits him dead on. Lupin learns of the even the next morning in the papers, and Fujiko and Goemon get implicated.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The prime minister of the Duchy of Blanco has a one-of-a-kind gold coin of Hannibal hidden in his chest; well, Lupin and crew are after it. Amidst their scheming, Jigen is challenged to a duel with a man named Stoneman.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The prime minister of France has run up a ridiculous tab with Maxim of Paris, and orders the Louvre Museum proprietor to sell a painting to cover his bill. But the proprietor doesn't want to let it go, and takes the painting out of the museum.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/17/22: Amed Rosario collects four RBIs and hits a walk-off single in the bottom of the 15th inning to help the Guardians edge the Twins, 7-6, in the second game of a doubleheader.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/20/22: On a brisk autumn night, Aaron Judge suddenly is one home run shy of Roger Maris' record and sparks an epic Yankees' comeback against the Pirates. Giancarlo Stanton feels the electric momentum and walks it off with a grand slam in the Bronx.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: The American League and National League face off in a pitching duel for four innings of the 1980 All-Star Game until Fred Lynn crushes a two-run homer. The NL would take the lead for good in the 6th.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: The 1986 All-Star Game resulted in an American League win that ended the National League's streak of winning the last 13 of 14 All-Star Games. Lou Whitaker and Frank White homered in the AL's 3-2 victory and Roger Clemens was named MVP.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: The National League battles back twice late in a thrilling victory, highlighted by clutch hits from Fred McGriff and Moises Alou. The 1994 MLB All-Star Game was the first NL win since 1987.

programme.title: MST3K: The Robot vs. The Aztec Mummy
programme.desc: Scientists search for the ancient breastplate of a mummy, culminating in a mad scientist's attempt to fight the creature through the construction of a robot.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: The first part of this essential guide to modern car sales techniques.

programme.title: Angel's Revenge
programme.desc: Seven women fight drug dealers.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: Don't leave the house before watching this indispensable guide to hygiene.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Secret Agent Super Dragon
programme.desc: A secret agent tries to stop a drug lord from taking over the world with hallucinogenic chewing gum.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A band of no-good punks beat a guy for driving too slow and steal his mechanical pencil, before arriving to pick up their missing member Jamie, the son of the man they've just beaten.

programme.title: Film Crew The Giant of Marathon
programme.desc: The Film Crew rip apart B-Movie legend Steve Reeves and The Giant of Marathon.

programme.title: The Giant Gila Monster
programme.desc: A hit-and-run victim is brought back from the dead by a voodoo doctor, and then seeks revenge.

programme.title: MST3K: The Giant Spider Invasion
programme.desc: Mike and the 'bots suffer through The Giant Spider Invasion (1975).

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Attack of the Giant Leeches
programme.desc: Hillbillies, holo-clowns, and a giant leech named Patches abound when Joel and the Bots take on this bloodsucking tale from acclaimed producer/director Roger Corman.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Cristian nunca se imaginó que una mujer como Andrea se fijaría en él, en un principio no lo tomó en serio y creía que era todo una broma. Pero luego de un tiempo, él y Andrea comenzaron a tener una relación en línea.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la inocencia de la infancia, el miedo es perfecto y no resulta influenciado por la racionalidad adulta, lo cual supone que se puede comprender a cabalidad el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando Clara y su familia se mudan a una pequeña casa en la zona rural de Hinsdale, Nueva York, se dan cuenta de que la paz de la vida en el campo es simplemente una ilusión y que la amenaza de muerte es muy real.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La casa de rancho de Ed y Beth parece el lugar perfecto para criar a su niño pequeño hasta que descubren que no están solos, y una espesa niebla oscura se cierne sobre la casa y crece día a día.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba

programme.desc: When SpongeBob mistakes an escaped convict for his driving instructor, it is the new teacher who learns a lesson; Mr. Krabs sends SpongeBob in search of a missing toy, and SpongeBob finds himself lost in the lost-and-found.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick has a coupon for free ice cream, but he has to get to the store if he wants to use it; Mr. Krabs buys Squidward's art, but to make a profit on his purchase he will have to get the artist out of the picture.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy is the only one who can save them; Patrick is sleepwalking, and SpongeBob is unable to wake him up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When a prehistoric sponge is unfrozen, he causes chaos all over town and only SpongeBob can communicate with him; when a flock of clams descend on Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob has to get them out before they ruin the whole town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When his pet amoeba Spot has puppies, Plankton decides to use them in another of his nefarious plots; Mr. Krabs is afraid to get his physical, but if he does not pass the Krusty Krab will be shut down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula; customers love Mr. Krabs' new krabby soup, until some heat-loving hippies move into the soup vat.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, SpongeBob and Patrick must stop his evil vacation; Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick leads an enthusiastic stranger on a tour of his favorite places in Bikini Bottom; SpongeBob is afraid to get off the roof of the Krusty Krab, but he will not let that stop him from living his life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: A new secret krabby patty formula has disastrous results for Bikini Bottom, and only SpongeBob can save the day; Mr. Krabs and Plankton have to take boating school classes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When Mr. Krabs gets in trouble for littering, he makes SpongeBob and Squidward clean up Bikini Bottom; a sea bunny ravages Squidward's garden, but SpongeBob thinks it's cute.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs manufactures krabby patties on an industrial scale, but it drives a wedge between SpongeBob and Patrick.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy creates the latest acorn-based food sensation, but her tree pays the price for her greed; SpongeBob puts up a community bulletin board at the Krusty Krab, but anonymous reviews lead to trouble.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The gang heads to a food convention, but things go awry when they become stranded in the woods; SpongeBob accidentally fibs to his pen pal, but when his friend comes to visit, he must keep the ruse going.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob hides the secret krabby patty formula in his home, Gary must protect it from Plankton; Sandy must save the day when a freak accident causes everyone in town to become as stupid as Patrick.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When a storm sweeps the Krusty Krab away, the crew and customers must rely on a crazed Krabs to lead them back home; Patrick's last baby tooth needs to come out, but he fears letting it go.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get hooked on the latest fad, flying your own brain like a tiny drone; SpongeBob and Patrick have fun playing as superheroes Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy until their sworn enemies arrive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob thinks he has an allergy to his pineapple, Squidward offers to help find him a new home; Squidward gets a nose job at the local hospital and SpongeBob tags along as moral support.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns that imitation is the sincerest form of flattery; when worms move in to SpongeBob's holes, he has to hide his disgusting new friends from everyone else.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward is so tired that SpongeBob and Patrick are unable to wake him up, but they do not want him to miss his big audition; Mr. Krabs and his crew cater a fancy party, but they might be out of their depth with their new wealthy customers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs' customers abandon him when SpongeBob starts cooking at home; when Plankton gets kicked out of the house, SpongeBob must teach him how to win his computer wife back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, SpongeBob and Patrick try to prove their life insurance protects them from any danger; when SpongeBob blows himself a bubble boat, everyone in town starts to want one.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton closes the Chum Bucket and moves to a new town, but Mr. Krabs suspects he is still up to no good; when SpongeBob accidentally picks up Neptune's magic trident, there is no telling what trouble he may cause.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob must figure out how to do his job after accidentally shrinking himself; Squidward invents a new sport to get back at SpongeBob and Patrick for annoying him.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde's spring break plans are put in jeopardy when they only have one day to complete their list; Lori throws a sophisticated party, but it backfires when her guests do not like what she has planned.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Tired of monotonous meals, the children make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza; Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby, but Lincoln does not trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde submit an Ace Savvy comic to a meet-the-creator contest, but are foiled by a surprising nemesis; when Lana brings home a new pet, whom the children adore, the four original Loud pets scheme to get rid of him.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When the children hear Lily curse, they become worried that they have been a bad influence on her; when a love letter addressed to L. Loud arrives, the family tries to figure out who it was meant for.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne and Bobby visit their crazy extended family, Bobby fits in great, but Ronnie Anne struggles with the smothering nature of their relatives.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Afraid they will be forgotten, Lincoln and Clyde want to make a splash in the yearbook and crash group photos; seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Clyde, worried that Lincoln is hung up on Ronnie Anne, tries to cure his post-breakup blues; tired of her siblings walking all over her, Lucy turns to a spell book to teach her siblings a lesson.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The Loud family believe that they are safe from pranks on April Fool's Day because prankster Luan is away at camp; when the children discover that their father is not at his old job anymore, they begin to worry it might be their fault.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that "ARGGH!" is coming to town; Lori moves to the garage.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Clyde is desperate to learn how to act normal around Lori, so he enlists Leni's help; worried that their parents are hurting their health from not being active, the children encourage them to exercise.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After meeting an impressive family, the Loud parents worry that their children are not doing enough to ensure successful futures; tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y Sid intentan destruir el restaurante de hamburguesas que abrió al otro lado de la calle. Luego de decidir que Par será su nuevo amigo, Bobby descubre que la situación podría superarlo.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne cree que el matrimonio de sus abuelos está en problemas después de ver un programa de televisión sobre parejas. Ronnie Anne aprende el arte del baile folklórico.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: La familia intenta ayudar a Bobby a superar los nervios por los exámenes. Carl se pierde en el zoológico después de escaparse de su familia para buscar un dragón de Komodo.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Durante su visita, Ronnie Anne intenta convencer a su padre de que se mude a la ciudad. Con la ayuda de Sid, formula un plan que no puede fallar.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Bobby se niega a ceder el control sobre el mercado durante su cita con Lori por motivo de su pizzaversario. Ronnie Anne se da cuenta de que ella es la única persona a la que Carlitos no imita, pero se propone conseguir que lo haga.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: A la abuela le preocupa que Ronnie Anne y Bobby quieran vivir en el nuevo apartamento de su padre para siempre. Carl organiza una casa embrujada basada en el cuento de la abuela sobre "El Cucuy" y descubre que quizás la historia no es solo ficción.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Durante su fiesta de cumpleaños, Tommy y sus amigos deciden ser perros. Tommy está seguro de que al comer comida de su mascota se transformará en perro.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica tira la pelota favorita de Tommy al otro lado de la valla en un picnic. Tommy va a un restaurante elegante con sus padres.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los chicos causan caos cuando van al cine. Tommy tiene sueños extraños sobre la escultura móvil sobre su cama.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Fili y Lili son estrellas en un comercial. Tommy va a la escuela y se convierte en el bebé más popular.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Dos bandidos secuestran a Tommy creyendo que es hijo de un millonario, pero pronto se arrepienten de su fechoría cuando Tommy hace un desastre en su escondite. Los Rugrats se embarcan en una aventura en la selva buscando a un alce en su patio.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: El abuelo tiene que tocar la trompeta en un picnic, pero Firulais se lleva su dentadura. Tommy y Carlitos deben recuperarla. Didi y Hugo llevan a Tommy a un psiquiatra de niños, después de ver lo que él había dibujado en las paredes con sus crayones.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Al ver un programa de miedo en la televisión donde un niño descubre que su papá es un robot, Tommy empieza a pensar que su propio padre es robot. Tommy se mete dentro de la bolsa del cartero y termina en el correo, donde lo confunden con un paquete.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo y Didi construyen una casa embrujada para Halloween y los Rugrats entran secretamente para buscar caramelos Reptar. Los adultos culpan a Firulais por los accidentes que sucedieron en el garaje, pero Tommy cree que su mascota es inocente.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Didi decide que es hora de sacarle el biberón a Tommy, pero él no quiere dejarlo. El Abuelo lleva a Tommy al supermercado. Allí, Tommy se entusiasma demasiado cuando ve una pirámide hecha de cajas de cereal Reptar, y termina provocando un desastre.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: First, Linda has slept with her daughter's husband, Torrey. Now he wants nothing to do with his mother-in-law or his marriage! Next Juan had sex with his fiancee's transsexual uncle and he's here to plead forgiveness from her.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Our cameras were at home with sisters Olivia and Catherine when Olivia confronted her older sister for sleeping with her boyfriend, Jacob. Next Jeromy has been having an affair with 2 sisters and both are now pregnant!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kenny lived with sisters Lora and Misty, who are also his lovers but he treats them like servants. Later, Jerry confronts Kenny with the results of the 9 positive paternity tests, but Kenny says he only cares about 2 of his 9 children.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Morgan literally dumps his fiancé at the altar for his secret lover, Victor! Next, John is leaving his fiancé, Jamie, now that his ex-wife wants him back! Later Dave is furious with his niece because she is engaged to a man of a different race.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: The truth comes out on today's Jerry Springer Show! Michelle tells her lover David that she's really a man. Speedy fights to win his ex-girlfriend back from her new lover Tom.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Dan is here today to beg Heather to give him another chance. Next Ginny wants Tim back and says that he still calls her. Later Shenidia is furious that another women is trying to steal her boyfriend of 4 years, Gary.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Shawna and her cousin, Amy, were friends until Amy slept with Shawna's man, Jeremy. Next Danny's girlfriend, Sylvia, has a husband who's gay. David admits he's been a pretty lousy husband, but now he wants to win his wife, DawnMarie, back.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Deuce is here to finally come clean to his wife and tell her that he's been sleeping with their friend. Next Debbie is about to find out that her boyfriend, Chris, is more than just friends with his friend Cory!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Today on MAURY…Gary comes home with marks on his body, which makes Heather question his fidelity. Then, Ramze's wife says he's giving out discounts in exchange for sexual favors. Plus, Shavon reveals a secret that could end her 7-year relationship!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Last time Lissett was on the show, she proved to her man Orlando that she was not a cheater. This time Lissett's sister has something crazy to confess! Then, Dretta's convinced that James is plowing more than other women's driveways.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Joseph and Rose are back for their third visit! Rose won't renew their vows unless Joseph passes another lie detector test about his fidelity! Will their relationship survive Maury's lie detector results?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jon is here to tell his girlfriend that he's been cheating on her with her brother! Next Kelly will dump her boyfriend for her secret lover, Bart. Then Malikah will tell her fiancé that she's had a secret lover for the past 3 years!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tiffany has been cheating with so many people and she's brought them all here today. Next Jimmy has been having an affair with his girlfriend's best friend, Summer. Later Curtis finds out his girlfriend, Sharon, never quit her wild job.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Can Kim get rid of her husband's meddling ex-lover? Next Daron says he loves his girlfriend, Jessica, but has never fully ended his relationship with his ex, Sarah. Then Tammy wants her boyfriend, Dave, to stop sleeping with his old girlfriend.

programme.desc: Mary busts her husband Bill him in bed with her cousin, Elizabeth. Next, Katie is 4 months pregnant and must tell her fiance that she's been cheating with a woman. Then, Mia says her male co-workers stole her girlfriend.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.desc: Who do Mexico City's top chefs believe will be the next great chef to emerge from Mexico? Pablo Salas. The odd thing is, Salas does not work in Mexico City. His restaurant, Amaranta, is in Toluca, and Rick travels to meet him there.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Mexico and chocolate go together like salsa and chips. A few Mexico City chocolatiers see more potential for Mexican chocolate beyond churros. They see single-origin chocolate bars, lovely hand-formed truffles, even ambitious sculptures.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.desc: Un campesino asa la salchicha equivocada; traficantes de drogas se convierten en comida de caníbales; un terrorista es ejecutado por un violinista; una boa constrictora exprime a un turista; estalla una fiesta de barril.

programme.title: Emergencias bizarras
programme.desc: Hoy conoceremos a la chica que se abrió la cabeza después de bailar en un castillo hinchable; a un ropavejero que se talló la mano con una navaja; y a una emergencia ecuestre después de que una amante de los caballos fuera pisoteada por su propio poni.

programme.title: Emergencias bizarras
programme.desc: Hoy conoceremos al hombre que se apuñaló la pierna al usar un cuchillo de trinchar como micrófono durante el karaoke; a una mujer que estuvo a punto de perder los dedos al destrozarse la mano en una máquina de impresión.

programme.title: Rescate aéreo
programme.desc: El paracaídas de un paracaidista no se abre. ¿Sobrevivirá? Una adrenalina que busca a un niño de diez años es arrojada de su moto y aterriza torpemente en la tierra.

programme.title: Rescate aéreo
programme.desc: El equipo de rescate de Westpac se arriesga a subir a bordo de un tanque de gas en problemas en el mar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso huye desesperadamente cuando hay disparos. Un padre e hija están atemorizados por un hombre que empuña un desarmador. La policía ve a muchas mujeres bellas tomando malas decisiones.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La madre de un conductor desafiante le da razón a la policía. Los oficiales descubren a un hombre con un disfraz raro durante una parada. La policía protege a una mamá trabajadora de la visita.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor evasivo le dice a la policía que es víctima de una chica muy mala. Una mujer embarazada toma decisiones cuestionables. Un sospechoso de robo se siente mejor al confesar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A un hombre enojado le cuesta aceptar la verdad. Los oficiales cuestionan a unas personas reservadas queriendo confirmar sus sospechas. Papá y mamá se ponen violentos y los niños llaman a la policía.

programme.title: Havana Motor Club
programme.desc: El cambio es correr por las calles de La Habana, donde los mejores corredores de arrastre subterráneos de Cuba luchan por preparar sus hot rods clásicos para la primera carrera oficial de autos desde la Revolución.

programme.title: Escobar: La herencia maldita
programme.desc: Cómo Pablo Escobar fue derrocado por las autoridades, y qué legado había significado su muerte para su heredero, Juan Pablo Escobar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un indigente juega con la policía cuando no tiene salida. Unos buenos ciudadanos atrapan a un hombre forzando entrada al coche de su vecino. Oficiales resuelven un conflicto entre recién casados.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso armado sorprende a los oficiales por sangriento. Conductor de un coche robado sale corriendo cuando lo paran. Agentes detienen a varios sospechosos después de ubicar un par de autos robados.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La falta de equipo de seguridad llama la atención de un infractor. Un hombre alardea su pistola y agentes revisan las casas cercanas. Hay confusión sobre los sospechosos detenidos después de chocar

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Dos agitadores se ven atrapados en caso de prostitución encubierto. Es mucho trabajo interrogar a una mujer evasiva. Una pelea llama la atención de un oficial atento.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un motociclista arriesga su vida en una persecución de alta velocidad. Un sospechoso dice mentiras para escapar. Una persona en libertad condicional culpa a su mamá cuando lo interrogan por su pasado.

programme.title: The Comedy Central Roast of Bob Saget
programme.desc: During the Roast of Bob Saget, America finds out that daddy doesn't know best. Roast Master John Stamos headlines a family-unfriendly event featuring appearances by Gilbert Gottfried, Jon Lovitz, Norm Macdonald, Cloris Leachman, and more.

programme.title: The Comedy Central Roast of William Shatner
programme.desc: Nominated for the 2007 Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Variety Special, the Roast of William Shatner places the actor in the hot seat as Roast Master Jason Alexander and a dais of comedians take him down several pegs.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live

programme.title: Comedy Central Presents
programme.desc: Patrice O'Neal discusses the importance of creating a paper trail, Americans' arrogance and why he couldn't kill his own food.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Best of Season 3: Ladies of the Night,' features Janeane Garofalo, Lynne Koplitz, Casey Balsham, Emma Willmann, Gina Brillon, Justy Dodge and more as they discuss relationships, sex life, kids, cultural diversity, and much more.

programme.title: Comedy Central Presents
programme.desc: Lisa Landry explains what a muffin top is, why Law & Order keeps her from jogging and the perils of marrying someone smarter than you.

programme.title: Comedy Central Presents
programme.desc: Tig Notaro describes nonsensical SkyMall items, wonders what her cat is thinking and learns about cultural sensitivity from Barbies.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Don't miss Last Comic Standing's Kathleen Madigan as she hosts an all-new hour of standup. Join Kathleen and four of America's funniest up and coming comics for a night of laugh-out-loud jokes that will have you rolling off the couch.

programme.title: Gabriel Iglesias Presents Stand Up Revolution

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 is captured by Aris Boch, a bounty hunter chasing an evil Goa'uld named Kel'tar. He offers them freedom in exchange for their help. They agree, only to find that Kel'tar is, in fact, a Tok'ra, whose capture would endanger countless others.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On another one of their quests, SG-1 encounters a medieval civilization and frees a woman tied to a stake as a sacrifice to a demon. When the woman is freed, the demon vows to destroy the village unless the SG-1 team is offered up in appeasement.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 lands in the middle of a blazing battle between some Stargate soldiers and a Jaffa army. Believing the soldiers to be the missing-in-action SG-11 team, O'Neill and the others provide assistance… until the mystery team turns its weapons on SG-1!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: During a rescue of captured Abydonians, Daniel finds his missing wife, Sha're. But instead of greeting him, she attacks him - leading to her death at the hands of Teal'c. Distraught over her death and angry at Teal'c, Daniel quits Stargate Command.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Keller and the Atlantis team meet with the Wraith, Todd, to deliver a startling proposition. Keller believes she has found a cure for the Wraiths of their need to feed on humans but requires a test subject for this breakthrough treatment.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay and Ronan volunteer to assist Dr. Jennifer Keller with a medical follow-up away from Atlantis. Later, when the pair return to her, they are surprised to learn that she left earlier but a search of the village turns up no sign of her.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Stargate SG-1’s Dr. Daniel Jackson (Michael Shanks) travels to Atlantis when his research suggests that a rebellious Ancient scientist named Janus (Gildart Jackson) may have hidden a secret lab somewhere within the city.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Jackson and McKay have reactivated the Attero device, an ancient machine designed to annihilate the Wraith. In doing so, they discover the reason the device was ultimately abandoned… Meanwhile, Todd continues to hold the Daedalus crew captive.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Col. Sheppard and his team locate Dr. Carson Beckett on an alien planet where he is treating a small group of survivors of the Hoffan plague. But that same evening, a party of Wraith warriors arrives, threatening total annihilation.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A newly formed galactic coalition extends an invitation to Lt. Col. John Sheppard and his team to represent Atlantis at their next meeting. But on arrival, the team is immediately detained and must stand trial for crimes against humanity.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: While Richard Woolsey (Robert Picardo) struggles to keep his position as the leader of Atlantis, and McKay (David Hewlett) and Zelenka (David Nykl) investigate a mysterious find, Sheppard is captured by an old enemy with plans to invade the city.
